description: Cluster is the Schema for the clusters API.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object. Servers should convert recognized schemas to the latest internal value, and may reject unrecognized values.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents. Cannot be updated.

spec.description: ClusterSpec defines the desired state of Cluster.

apiServerPort.description: APIServerPort specifies the port the API Server should bind to. Defaults to 6443.

pods.description: The network ranges from which Pod networks are allocated.

cidrBlocks.description: CIDR blocks defining the pod network. Example: 192.168.0.0/16.

services.description: The network ranges from which service VIPs are allocated.

cidrBlocks.description: CIDR blocks defining the service network. Example: 172.30.0.0/16.

controlPlaneEndpoint.description: ControlPlaneEndpoint represents the endpoint used to communicate with the control plane.

host.description: The hostname on which the API server is serving.

port.description: The port on which the API server is serving.

controlPlaneRef.description: ControlPlaneRef is a reference to a provider-specific resource that holds the details for provisioning the Control Plane.

infrastructureRef.description: InfrastructureRef is a reference to a provider-specific resource that holds the details for provisioning infrastructure for a cluster.

paused.description: Paused can be used to prevent controllers from processing the Cluster and all its associated objects.
